question: Which of the following is true about the electricity demand in Region R during 2023?

options.A: Electricity demand was highest in February and lowest in July.
options.B: Electricity demand steadily declined over the first half of the year.
options.C: Electricity demand remained constant throughout the year.
options.D: Electricity demand was highest in July and lowest in February.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
